bank.retain_mission: Extract Blender add-on-engineering decisions: scripting patterns, UI conventions, and pipeline integrations.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about Blender version, target users of the add-on, and Python/UI conventions. Ignore one-off prototype scripts.

mental_models.name: Add-on Architecture
mental_models.source_query: How are Blender add-ons structured here? Operators, panels, properties, packaging.

mental_models.name: Pipeline Integration
mental_models.source_query: How does the add-on integrate with the wider DCC pipeline? Imports, exports, naming conventions.
